205 F3D F3D_NONE_ABOVE (F3D) None of Above Past Roles CHAR 1 Psychosocial well-being: past roles - none of above. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown, -2 = Space.
206 G1AA G1AA_SELF_BED (G1AA) Bed Mobility Self Performance CHAR 1 Physical functioning and structural problems: bed mobility - ADL self-performance "-" = Unknown, 0 = Independent - No help or oversight -OR- Help/oversight provided only 1 or 2 times during last 7 days, 1 = Supervision - Oversight,
